description_long: This house consists of several connected rectangular volumes, each with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some sections featuring darker accents and large window openings. The structure includes multiple entry points, a small porch area, and a visible driveway or parking space. There are a few trees and landscaping elements adjacent to the house, adding to its suburban residential feel. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall layout suggests a single-story dwelling with open-plan living spaces and a focus on functional, contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, light-colored walls, large windows, and minimalistic landscaping. The design features asymmetrical window placement and a small porch area.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entry, driveway, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roofs, open courtyard, and overall building footprint.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the back yard, additional windows, and landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main entry, porch, and driveway from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a small porch area
